_note: Dumper does NOT classify. transformation/canonical_niche/canonical_angle are ALWAYS null here — the classifier fills them. claims[] strings must be verbatim substrings of clean copy (validator-enforced).

creatives.creative_id: library_id for ads | canonical-URL for pages
creatives.angle_raw: emotional frame in copy's own terms — OPEN, not an enum

mechanism: how/why THIS outcome is achieved, verbatim Feature-UM; may be empty; per-pitch
problem_um_raw: causal story for WHY the buyer has THIS problem; verbatim; may be empty

creatives.linked_funnel_id: creative_id of the page this ad's CTA points to | null
